rule_description: Purchases up to $1500 are auto-approved
Purchases between $1501–$3000 require manager approval and 2 quotes
Purchases above $3000 require manager, finance, and CTO approval
Annual hardware budget per employee is $2500
Vendor must be selected from approved vendor list
Economy class required for flights under 6 hours
Business class allowed for flights over 6 hours for executive-level employees
Hotel cost must not exceed $250 regional
Hotel cost must not exceed $400 international major cities
Receipts mandatory for reimbursement
Only software from approved registry allowed
SaaS handling customer data requires security review and DPA
No pirated software allowed
Restricted data must be encrypted at rest
Restricted data must not be shared via email
External sharing requires legal approval
Contracts must include minimum 30-day termination notice
Liability cap must not exceed 12 months of contract value
Indemnification clauses must be reviewed by legal
Vendor must pass compliance screening
Vendors processing customer data must comply with GDPR
Payment terms must not exceed Net 60 unless CFO approval
Employees must disclose financial interest in vendors
Undisclosed conflict results in disciplinary action
Company provides 1 laptop and 1 monitor
Replacement allowed every 3 years
